name: match-literals
expansion_description: IIFE with const target, if (target === 200) return 'ok', if (target === 404) return 'not found', block return 'unknown'

name: match-adt
note: Requires prior (type Option (Some :any value) None) for type registry
expansion_description: IIFE: if (target.tag === 'Some') { const v = target.value; return v; } if (target.tag === 'None') { return 0; }

name: match-structural
expansion_description: IIFE: if (typeof target === 'object' && target !== null && 'ok' in target && 'data' in target && target.ok === true) { const d = target.data; return process(d); }

name: match-wildcard
expansion_description: IIFE with if for literal 1, then block for wildcard default. No throw.
